title: erigeron salsuginosus subsp. angustifolius
intro: Erigeron salsuginosus subsp. angustifolius is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, commonly known as a species of fleabane. It is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress, providing health benefits such as reducing the risk of chronic diseases like heart disease and cancer. The herbal preparations of Erigeron salsuginosus subsp. angustifolius include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
